sourceMovie.title: Entourage
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Entourage works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Entourage clicked for you, Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Entourage?
faq.answer: Try Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood, Confessions of a Dangerous Mind, Swingers—each shares DNA with Entourage while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Entourage?
faq.answer: Entourage (2015) is best described as Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Entourage worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
